name: Josh Lee
title: Attending Physician
bio: Dr. Lee grew up in the Midwest. He has been fortunate to be able to train all over the United States. He earned his medical degree from Northwestern University, Feinberg School of Medicine. He completed his residency at Duke University, and his fellowship at the University of Washington. In his free time, Dr. Lee enjoys hiking, travel, and basketball (both watching and playing).
education: Northwestern University - Feinberg School of Medicine
